message:
test(e2e): add Quick Start tutorial path E2E tests

Comprehensive E2E test coverage for the 7-step Quick Start tutorial:

- Happy path tests: Verify all steps load correctly, display expected
  content (Two Axioms, artifact preview sections), and navigation works
- Navigation tests: Direct URL access, browser back button, Previous
  button state (disabled on step 1), overview to step 1 flow
- Mobile viewport tests: Responsive design verification on 375x667
- Persistence tests: localStorage progress tracking and restoration
- Edge cases: 404 handling for invalid steps, progress clearing
- Accessibility: Heading structure, keyboard navigation, visibility

Tests use existing E2E utilities (navigateTo, clickElement, assertUrl,
etc.) and follow established patterns from home-navigation.spec.ts.

Closes: brenner_bot-hdyq
